metadata.title: SENMARES - Naval Electronics
metadata.description: Electronic repair and automation control services for the maritime industry. Specialized technical solutions for every zone of your vessel.

hero.description: Electronic repair and automation control services for the maritime industry. Specialized technical solutions from bridge to engine room.

services.label: What We Do
services.title: Our Services
services.description: Specialized electronic repair and automation solutions covering every critical zone of your vessel.

about.label: Who We Are
about.p1: SENMARES is a specialized naval electronics service company based in Buenos Aires, Argentina. We provide electronic repair, automation control, and technical consulting for vessels operating in Argentine and international waters.
about.p2: Our team of certified technicians offers comprehensive coverage across every critical system of your vessel — from the navigation bridge to the engine room — ensuring operational continuity and regulatory compliance.

contact.label: Get In Touch
contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Need technical support or a quote? Our team is available to assist you at any port.
contact.certFormDesc: Need a certification? Fill out our online form directly.

success.title: Message sent!
success.description: We'll get back to you as soon as possible.
